creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
I'll grab this PR (doc contributor) => Assignee: Dries Michiels

Hi Rod,

Do you think that adding a section with KERNEL config switches to the manpage is a good thing? At the moment the switches are documented in the handbook it seems. Although, the manpage is probably the "master" for info like this I recon. I'm happy to add a section to the manpage.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/firewalls-ipfw.html
"IPFW kernel options"
